text:
petef@databits.net wrote:

>> I'm not sure I completely follow you, as I still end up with sdl11-config 
>> installed (not sure if it works as desired).  Would something like this be 
>> what you are looking for? 

	I think this behaiver is strange(AUTOMAKE = #@AUTOMAKE@ in patch-aj,
	etc...).  So I pkg_delete automake-1.4 and reinstall PORTS automake.
	Then this behaiver is not. Sorry, I don't backup old automake
	binaries and I forget installation of PORTS automake at WHEN.
